review_gates.notes: Splitting the research-distillation profile (kernel id research-distillation-workflow-contract) into a standalone repo; generic-agent adapter is the portable surface.

Kernel, profile-index entry, and skill files are copied as authoritative sources; workflow-contract artifacts under profiles/research-distillation/ remain in the source repo until a follow-up plan moves them.
Direct-entrypoint selection semantics are carried over via selection_semantics in the manifest and kernel adapters block.
Source inventory, file copy list, and exclusion list reviewed manually before scaffolding the destination repo.
Pre-split: acceptance_checks in source repo. Post-split: re-run exporter, validator, and inventory script against copied kernel in destination repo.
Privacy audit at schemas/skill-kernel/repo-split/research-distillation-privacy-audit-2026-05-28.json reports status: passed with zero hits over the proposed split set.
Inventory + audit confirm no credential / concrete sidecar / personal-identifier patterns appear in any file the scaffolder would copy.

privacy_audit.notes: Programmatic audit at schemas/skill-kernel/repo-split/research-distillation-privacy-audit-2026-05-28.json scans every included file for credential / personal-identifier / concrete sidecar patterns and reports 0 hits.

rollback.restore_strategy: Record destination repo URL, commit hash before scaffolding, and exact file copy list; on rollback, delete the destination repo (or revert its first commit) and restore the source profile-index entry from the rollback record.
